stack.frontend: Angular SPA (Angular 17/18, lazy-loaded modules: order, account, auth)
stack.backend: ASP.NET Core on Microsoft IIS/10.0 behind AWS ALB
stack.auth: AWS Cognito (eu-west-1 user pool eu-west-1_CooYqUepb, app client 6gkffmi3bl2qdbu6os8bkfmn2n)

headers.Authorization1: Bearer <CognitoIdToken>  (NOTE: literal name is 'Authorization1' with a digit, not 'Authorization')

auth_pattern.notes: Cognito ID token stored in localStorage under 'AUTH_TOKEN' as JSON {token, type:'Cognito'} and also under standard amplify keys CognitoIdentityServiceProvider.<clientId>.<username>.idToken / accessToken / refreshToken. Token TTL ~1 hour. WEBSTORE_SESSION is short-lived; refresh via GET /api/Orders/GetSessionToken.

endpoints.purpose: Issues WEBSTORE_SESSION token. Required for cart/order endpoints.
Public catalog of all device types and models. ~189 KB. Includes language-specific names + slugs in 24 languages.
Returns list of repair types valid for a given device model id. Includes language_specific_attributes for each repair-type id.

Validate Apple device serial -> {deviceModelId, deviceTypeId, deviceModel, deviceModelCode, productCode, manualId, color, error, findMy}. Requires reCAPTCHA v3 token (site key 6LeoZYIdAAAAAAjZn-24zcepMBi08U8a9zvgAFAs).
Free-text spare-part search. Empty string returns [].
Compatible parts for a given device + repair type. Returns array of spare objects (see schema in skill doc). 200 status, ~100 KB+ for a Display search on MacBook Pro.
Logged-in user profile. Returns id, email, username, fullname, phone, country, default-address ids, etc.
User's saved billing/shipping addresses.
Add address.
Update address.
Address validation (likely against Radial / postal service).
Mark default ship-to.
Update account profile.
Activate new account from email link.
Account creation with reCAPTCHA gate.
Validate reCAPTCHA token.
Current shopping cart contents (server-side cart keyed by WEBSTORE_SESSION + user).

endpoints.body: Cart object: {details:[{spare:{id,partnumber,...}, devicemodel:{id}, sn, orderedquantity, id_repairtypes, ...}], country:{id}, language:{id}, currency:{id}, shiptocountry, shiptostate, ordernumber, ...}
endpoints.purpose: Add/update/remove cart line items. Replaces full cart.
Empty cart.

endpoints.body: {ordernumber}, opaque payment data via custom RDFUID header (Authorize.net Accept.js token).
endpoints.purpose: Authorize.net card checkout.
Initiates Stripe payment intent. Returns {clientSecret, type}. Confirmed client-side via Stripe Elements.
Validate Stripe checkout state.
Finalize Stripe payment after client-side confirmation.
Finalize Stripe SetupIntent (saved card).

endpoints.body: Radial payment response object (from radial-hostedpayments-js-sdk) + RDFUID header.
endpoints.purpose: Radial hosted-payment checkout.
Apple Pay (via Authorize.net InApp). Also Stripe Apple Pay path exists.
Apple-Pay merchant-validation handshake.
PayPal Smart Buttons - createOrder.
PayPal capture.
Order history list (summary). 91 orders for this account at time of audit.
Full order detail incl. details[] (line items), shippingaddress, billingaddress, financial_documents (invoice/credit-note URLs), tracking numbers.
Public order lookup by token (used for guest order status / shipping confirmation emails).
Generate replaced-part return shipping label.
Returns Radial SDK config for the user's country.
